summary: Personal trading portfolio dashboard — total value, today's P&L, featured ticker chart, holdings table, watchlist, news/signals, and an AI-generated investment recommendation. Designed to be refreshable on demand: price/holdings/news fields can be rewritten in data.json without re-authoring the template.

sources.label: Brokerage holdings (mocked)
sources.note: Position-level data is illustrative. In a connected setup the refresh runner would pull positions from a brokerage connector (Robinhood, IBKR, Schwab) and write only normalized fields: symbol, shares, avgCost, marketValue, unrealizedPnl, allocation.

sources.label: Quotes (mocked)
sources.note: Featured ticker price + delta + 21-day series are illustrative. A connected refresh would call a quote provider (IEX Cloud, Polygon, Alpha Vantage) and write only the fields template.html binds to (price, delta, OHLC stats, line/area polyline points).

sources.label: AI recommendation
sources.note: Signal #2417 is illustrative. A real refresh would re-run an analyst prompt over the holdings + market context and write headline, sub, conviction, target, suggested size, and 3 catalysts back into data.json.

transformations.note: Data is normalized to display-ready strings — '$284,521.64', '+$3,182.40', '+1.13%' — so the template stays free of formatting logic. Numbers and percentages are pre-formatted; direction is encoded via an explicit dirClass field ('up' / 'down').

Polyline 'points' strings (line + area) for the portfolio P&L chart, the featured ticker chart, and each watchlist sparkline are pre-computed and stored as plain strings. Template uses single attribute interpolation only — no expression evaluation.

Each holding/watchlist row carries its own exchUrl (NASDAQ / NYSE quote page). Featured ticker carries three explicit URLs: primary exchange, Yahoo Finance, TradingView. No inline scripting; links are vanilla anchors.

refreshContract.notes: Refresh runner should write a fresh data.json that matches the template's binding shape. Daemon validates against bounded JSON limits and re-derives index.html from template.html + data.json. No raw HTML is ever stored in data.json — every binding lands in escaped text or attribute slots.

safetyNotes: No credentials, OAuth tokens, cookies, raw provider responses, or HTTP envelopes are persisted.
Forbidden keys (raw, payload, body, headers, cookie, authorization, token, secret, credential, password) are not present in data.json.
All template interpolation is escaped text or ordinary attributes — no script/style/event-handler attribute interpolation, no raw HTML insertion.
